name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Execution via WorkFolders
notes:
This Building Block detects using WorkFolders.exe to execute an arbitrary control.exe.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Maxime Thiebaut (@0xThiebaut)
SIGMA Title: Execution via WorkFolders.exe
SIGMA Description: Detects using WorkFolders.exe to execute an arbitrary control.exe


Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Execution via WorkFolders on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of control.exe
when the event matches Parent Process Name (custom) is any of WorkFolders.exe
when the event matches Process Path (custom) is any of C:\Windows\System32\control.exe
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Execution via WorkFolders on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of control.exe
AND when the event matches Parent Process Name (custom) is any of WorkFolders.exe
AND NOT when the event matches Process Path (custom) is any of C:\Windows\System32\control.exe
